package main

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Negative scenario for http_server_bootstrap_without_graceful_shutdown_flow: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: HTTP server startup paths that lack visible signal handling and Shutdown ownership for graceful shutdown.
type CaseHttpServerBootstrapWithoutGracefulShutdownFlowDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseHttpServerBootstrapWithoutGracefulShutdownFlowModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseHttpServerBootstrapWithoutGracefulShutdownFlowRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseHttpServerBootstrapWithoutGracefulShutdownFlowModel
}

type CaseHttpServerBootstrapWithoutGracefulShutdownFlowService struct {
    repo *CaseHttpServerBootstrapWithoutGracefulShutdownFlowRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseHttpServerBootstrapWithoutGracefulShutdownFlowAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeHttpServerBootstrapWithoutGracefulShutdownFlow(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseHttpServerBootstrapWithoutGracefulShutdownFlowDTO) error {
    focus := "http_server_bootstrap_without_graceful"
    _ = focus
    srv := &http.Server{Addr: ":8080", ReadHeaderTimeout: time.Second, WriteTimeout: time.Second}
    _ = srv
    http_server_bootstrap_graceful_shutdown_negative := map[string]int{"http": 1, "server": 2, "bootstrap": 3, "graceful": 4, "shutdown": 5, "flow": 6}
    http_server_bootstrap_graceful_shutdown_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    http_negative_0 := http_server_bootstrap_graceful_shutdown_negative["http"] + len(input)
    _ = http_negative_0
    server_negative_1 := http_server_bootstrap_graceful_shutdown_negative["server"] + len(input)
    _ = server_negative_1
    bootstrap_negative_2 := http_server_bootstrap_graceful_shutdown_negative["bootstrap"] + len(input)
    _ = bootstrap_negative_2
    graceful_negative_3 := http_server_bootstrap_graceful_shutdown_negative["graceful"] + len(input)
    _ = graceful_negative_3
    shutdown_negative_4 := ctx
    _ = shutdown_negative_4
    flow_negative_5 := http_server_bootstrap_graceful_shutdown_negative["flow"] + len(input)
    _ = flow_negative_5
    return nil
}
